Source   Edit  

Config Accessor Macros

Data-Oriented Design: Eliminate 120+ lines of case duplication in construction.nim by using compile-time code generation

Before: 18 × 2 case branches + 5 × 2 case branches = 56 case branches After: 2 macro calls

Ship Config Accessor MacroConstruction Time Accessor MacroClean Wrapper Procs (These replace the duplicated case statements)Building Config (smaller duplication, but still worth cleaning up)Export for use in construction.nim

Imports

../../common/types/units, ../config/ships_config, ../config/construction_config, ../config/facilities_config

Procs

proc getBuildingCost(buildingType: string): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get construction cost for building type from config REFACTORED: Was 19 lines, now single lookup Source   Edit   
proc getBuildingTime(buildingType: string): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get construction time for building type from config REFACTORED: Was 18 lines, now single lookup Source   Edit   
proc getShipBaseBuildTime(shipClass: ShipClass): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get base construction time (before CST modifier) from ships.toml Per reference.md:9.1.1 REFACTORED: Was 44 lines, now 3 lines (macro generates code at compile time) Source   Edit   
proc getShipConstructionCost(shipClass: ShipClass): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get construction cost (PC) for ship class from ships.toml Per reference.md:9.1 REFACTORED: Was 44 lines, now 3 lines (macro generates code at compile time) Source   Edit   
proc requiresSpaceport(buildingType: string): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if building requires a spaceport REFACTORED: Was 9 lines, now single lookup Source   Edit  

Macros

macro getConstructionTimeField(shipClass: ShipClass; config: untyped): untyped

Generate case statement to access construction time fields These fields have "_base_time" suffix in config

Usage: getConstructionTimeField(shipClass, globalShipsConfig.construction)

Source   Edit   
macro getShipField(shipClass: ShipClass; fieldName: untyped; config: untyped): untyped

Generate case statement to access any ship config field Eliminates 18-branch case duplication across multiple procs

Usage: getShipField(shipClass, build_cost, globalShipsConfig) getShipField(shipClass, as_rating, globalShipsConfig)

Source   Edit
